title: CBK holds base lending rate steady amid inflation watch
summary: The Central Bank's Monetary Policy Committee opted to hold the benchmark rate, citing stable inflation expectations and a cautious outlook on the shilling.
author: Business Desk

title: Banks report rising uptake of mobile-first personal loans
summary: Several lenders say app-based instant loans now account for a growing share of new personal credit, driven by faster approval times and lower onboarding friction.
author: Fintech Desk

title: Agency banking networks cross a new milestone nationwide
summary: Bank-appointed agents now outnumber traditional branches many times over, extending cash-in, cash-out, and account services deep into rural trading centres.
author: Correspondent

title: Diaspora remittance inflows remain a key forex pillar
summary: Money sent home by Kenyans abroad continues to be one of the largest sources of foreign exchange, with banks competing on transfer speed and fees.
author: Business Desk

title: Money market funds attract savers seeking better returns
summary: More retail investors are shifting idle savings into money market funds as banks and asset managers push app-based investment products.
author: Markets Desk

title: Lenders pilot QR-code payments for small merchants
summary: A wave of QR payment pilots aims to reduce cash handling for small traders while integrating directly with existing mobile money rails.
author: Fintech Desk

title: Green financing products gain traction among SMEs
summary: Several commercial banks have expanded asset finance lines for solar equipment and energy-efficient machinery aimed at small and medium enterprises.
author: Business Desk

title: CBK reiterates guidance on customer data protection
summary: Regulators have reminded licensed institutions of their obligations around customer data handling as digital banking adoption accelerates.
author: Correspondent
